1.content:
Omg Lois says and you all thought what Stewie said in church was bad, but after what Susie just said I think we know who actually has a potty mouth. What happens next with Susie Swanson?

(a) she's sent to her room.
(b) she's sent to the time out chair.
(c) she's lectured about what she can and can't say out loud.
(d) they pack a suit case for Susie and send her to stay with the Griffin's for a few weeks.
(e) her parents and Stewie's parents decide to send them to a special preschool for potty mouths.
1.title: Everyone is shocked at what Susie just said

info.brief_description: After Stewie drops the f word in church people avoid Lois and don't want Stewie around.
info.description: So after Stewie drops the f word in church Lois tries to find out who he learned that word from, but is shocked to find out that he learned it from his own mom. So the Swanson's are having a party but they tell Lois to leave saying they don't want potty mouth Stewie at their party. When all of a sudden Susie Swanson says fuck you, because if Stewie isn't welcome here than I don't want to fucking be here. What happens next do the Swanson's punish Susie for her potty mouth or let her go with Stewie and Lois to avoid anymore potty mouth out bursts from Susie.
